### Parameter Notes

| Parameter | Value | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `reason-code` | `snomed\|38341003` | Hypertensive disorder, systemic arterial |
| `reason-code` | `icd-10-cm\|I10` | Essential (primary) hypertension |
| `status` | `active` | Only current/active prescriptions |
| `_include` | `:patient` | Pull associated Patient resources |
| `_include` | `:medication` | Pull associated Medication resources |

### 📌 PheKB Classification Logic Summary

| Type | Criteria | FHIR Sources |
|------|----------|--------------|
| **Type 1** (Resistant HTN) | Classes A + B + C + D **simultaneously active** | Intersect all 4 `MedicationRequest` sets |
| **Type 2** (Resistant HTN) | Any 3 classes + Systolic ≥140 **or** Diastolic ≥90 | Intersect any 3 med sets ∩ `Observation` elevated BP |
| **Prerequisite** | ICD-10 I10 active diagnosis | `Condition` set |
